entries.text: Have Janet report Claude Code usage as percentage of current 5-hour window rather than dollar amounts — more meaningful for Max subscription
Clarify whether Janet's Discord bot is using Anthropic API (per-token billing) or Claude Max subscription — need to verify which billing path the bot's API key is on
Confirmed Discord bot uses Claude Code CLI (not Anthropic API) — all usage covered under Max subscription, no separate API billing
Set up regular web monitoring for AI filmmaking, micro drama, and vertical drama content across LinkedIn and other platforms
Research best approach for tracking industry content on AI filmmaking and vertical drama — consider periodic Brave Search sweeps as alternative to LinkedIn scraping
Long Discord conversations cause sluggish response times — need to implement auto-compaction of Claude context
Auto-restart Claude process every ~20 exchanges to prevent context bloat and slow responses in long Discord conversations
Added auto-recycle to claude-runner.js — kills and respawns Claude process every 20 exchanges to prevent context bloat and slow responses
Janet should send a "back online" notification to KS via DM whenever the bot restarts or the Claude process recycles
Slow response times on simple messages due to sequential context fetching (calendar, Oura, reminders, memory) — needs parallelization in bot.js
Optimize context loading to only fetch necessary data based on user input
Current architecture loads all context (calendar, Oura, reminders, etc.) on every message, leading to unnecessary overhead
Implement conditional context loading — fetch only the relevant data based on the user's question or task
Implemented lazy context loading — calendar and Oura only fetched when message content warrants it, not on every message. Reminders, memory, journal always loaded (local files, no latency cost)
Implementing an optimized context loading architecture to improve performance and reduce unnecessary API calls
Double-reply bug — Discord messageCreate events firing twice, no dedup guard. Fixed by tracking message IDs in a Set and skipping duplicates
Double "back online" notifications caused by startup race between client.ready DM and onRecycle callback — fixed with 3s delay and 30s cooldown guard
Potential Janet upgrades: Granola meeting notes integration, health trend analysis over time, proactive project deadline tracking, quick idea capture flow
KS approved all four Janet upgrade ideas: Granola meeting notes integration, health trend analysis, proactive project deadline nudges, quick idea capture flow
Build Granola meeting notes integration — pull action items and decisions automatically
Build health trend analysis — weekly sleep/readiness/recovery patterns from Oura data
Build proactive project nudge system — track deadlines mentioned in conversation
Build quick idea capture flow — more intentional than current journal auto-tagging

Built and integrated 4 new Janet modules: health-trends.js (Oura weekly analysis), deadlines.js (project deadline tracker with heartbeat nudges), ideas.js (idea parking lot), granola.js (meeting notes — needs API key from KS)
Switching to Granola's official MCP server (https://mcp.granola.ai/mcp) instead of custom API token approach — simpler, no token needed
Granola MCP tools blocked by Claude Code permission prompt in headless mode — fixed by adding --allowedTools flag to claude-runner.js

Granola MCP server installed — switching from custom API token approach to official MCP at mcp.granola.ai/mcp. Need to decide whether to keep granola.js context injection or rely on MCP tools directly.
Discussing Granola integration workflow — morning briefing with action items, pre-meeting prep 15min before calls, on-demand deep pulls, and heartbeat checks for overdue items
Morning Granola briefing moved to 8:30am instead of 7:30am — sleep briefing stays at 7:30, Granola debrief at 8:30 when workday starts
